title: batch_acknowledged_v1
description: Written by the Metricool partner after ingesting the daily batch. Wipe script will not delete staging until this file exists with failed_count == 0.

batch_date.description: Must match the batch_date in daily_batch.json.

acknowledged_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when partner completed ingest.

failed_count.description: Number of videos that failed partner ingest. 0 = all succeeded.

failed_ids.description: video_ids that failed ingest. Empty or omitted when failed_count == 0.
